calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-25-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion Setting Default Proveup Hearing For Entry Of Courts Default Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-27-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Craig C. Daniel, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, RNM SUTTER, L.P.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) ANDREW FLEISCHMAN & MOLLY FLEISCHMAN.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Abby Donahue and Jayson Sohi sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $127,742.84
Pre-Judgment Interest: $15,820.00
Attorney's Fees: $10,981.00
Costs: $1,021.85
Total Judgment in the amount of $155,565.69
Judgment signed in open court.

Notice Of Motion And Motion Setting Default Proveup Hearing For Entry Of Courts Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-10-2015 Continued To Aug-27-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
